title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Zydus Lifesciences

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Zydus Lifesciences
jsonLd.description:
Zydus Lifesciences has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Delhi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Zydus Lifesciences:
Zydus Lifesciences is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zydus Lifesciences!
